series_metadata.series_description: All political subdivisions wishing to make transfers of funds except those provided by section 5705.14, R.C., require the permission of the Division of Tax Equalization to file in the Common Pleas Courts. Sections 5705.15 and 5705.16, R.C.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: current and preceding year. If scanned, . ; Electronic: current and preceding year
